V-M-072.scope: Premium Matrix art direction verification for palette, typography, density, logo rules, and reduced-motion readability.

success-scenarios.scenario-1: Palette is balanced and not a one-note green/purple/blue theme.
success-scenarios.scenario-2: Premium tokens preserve compact density and focus-visible accessibility.
success-scenarios.scenario-3: Reduced-motion visual identity remains readable without flicker-heavy effects.

failure-scenarios.failure-1: Text overlap, oversized cards, nested panels, decorative orbs, or unreadable neon contrast.
failure-scenarios.failure-2: Deploy/install/nginx/docker-compose diff appears during art direction work.
